description.en: Transform oral/casual prompts into structured, professional formal prompt templates. Supports deep creation for multiple content types
description.zh: 将口述/随意的提示词深度创作，转化为结构化、专业的正式提示词模板。支持多种内容类型的深度创作

description.en: Three Provinces and Six Ministries multi-agent thinking framework. Structure any complex task through Crown Prince (sorting) → Secretariat (planning) → Chancellery (review) → Department of State Affairs (dispatch) → Six Ministries (execution) → Summary.
description.zh: 三省六部多Agent思维框架。将任何复杂任务按照太子(分拣)→中书省(规划)→门下省(审议)→尚书省(派发)→六部(执行)→汇总的流程进行结构化处理。
